en: Seems you cannot be replaced And I'm the one who'll stay, oh
ko: 당신은 대체 불가능한 것 같고, 내가 남을 거야, 오

en: In this world, it's just us
You know it's not the same as it was
In this world, it's just us
You know it's not the same as it was
As it was, as it was
ko: 예전과 같지 않아, 예전과 같지 않아

en: You know it's not the same
ko: 당신은 같지 않다는 걸 알고 있어

en: Answer the phone, Harry you're no good alone
ko: 전화 받아, 해리, 혼자 있으면 안 돼

en: Why are you sitting at home alone?
What kind of pills do you want?
Ringing the bell, and nobody's coming to help
ko: 초인종을 누르는데, 아무도 도와주러 오지 않아

en: Your daddy lives by himself, he just wants to know that you're well
ko: 당신 아버지는 혼자 살고 있어, 당신이 잘 지내는지 알고 싶어 해
